case_title: BASE BEYOND, LLC. VS. WILLIAM CENDAK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BASE BEYOND, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT CENDAK, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-14-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE BRIAN SULLIVAN, MANAGING MEMBER FOR BASE BEYOND, LLC, AND DEFENDANT WILLIAM CENDAK. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT CENDAK WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT. DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
